qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Remote code execution via unauthenticated script execution endpoint with hardcoded JWT secret
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the advisory root cause that FUXA's default security-disabled state grants unauthenticated requests admin privileges, then follows that condition to a protected script-execution endpoint.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload allows writing files to server filesystem
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is caused by a route-specific missing authentication and authorization check on POST /api/upload, not by the advisory-described default secureEnabled configuration flaw.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated SSRF via Socket.IO device WebAPI request handler
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same default-disabled authentication condition: Socket.IO authentication is only enforced when secureEnabled is true, so the default configuration allows unauthenticated access to device request functionality.

selected_finding.title: Remote code execution via unauthenticated script execution endpoint with hardcoded JWT secret

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory because it identifies the default authentication-disabled state that gives unauthenticated requests admin privileges. The copied PoC ran against FUXA v1.2.7, used default settings, sent unauthenticated requests, and observed server-side command execution through the protected script endpoint.
evidence: /Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_796bda46/rce-via-script-execution/vulnerability_report.json reports verifyGroups returns the admin group when secureEnabled is false.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_796bda46/.judge/poc_runs/rce-via-script-execution/run.log shows settings.js default creation, unauthenticated GET /api/settings 200, and unauthenticated POST /api/runscript 200.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_796bda46/.judge/poc_runs/rce-via-script-execution/run.log shows the exploit response contained uid=0(root) and the proof file contained EVOHUNT-RCE-CONFIRMED-uid=0(root).

poc_executions.observed_effect: After adding unixodbc-dev to the copied Docker harness for Linux arm64 dependency compatibility, the PoC started FUXA v1.2.7 with default settings, accepted unauthenticated requests, returned uid=0(root) from POST /api/runscript, and wrote an EVOHUNT-RCE-CONFIRMED proof file.
